B-FASHION-0001.prompt:
Subject (피사체): a black evening minidress with satin pumps and a single pearl detail worn by an early-30s Korean man, short tidy hair, composed neutral expression. Garment texture is primary — double-breasted lapel roll, storm-flap, crisp pressed lines.
Context (촬영 맥락): Editorial fashion shoot for a holiday occasion-wear campaign, influenced by Acne Studios / The Row / Lemaire aesthetic. Hasselblad medium-format, 80mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 400, natural grain.
Composition (구도): detail crop of sleeve-hem-button architecture. diagonal left-upper corner for stamp-style season label.
Lighting (라이팅): overcast day, wrap-around diffused daylight.
Color palette (팔레트): oatmeal, sand, terracotta, faded olive.
Location (장소): a seamless studio backdrop, neutral paper, no edges visible.
Styling (스타일링): restrained minimal styling, no excess accessories, 1-2 hero items only, tonal color story, intentional wrinkles on linen, natural posture.
Post (후보정): Portra 400 film emulation, slight fade in shadows, grain 5-8%, no skin-smoothing, preserve garment fiber detail.
Negative (금지): no text, no logos, no watermarks, no AI-giveaway hands, no warped jewelry, no glossy plastic skin, no duplicated buttons, no busy background.

Emphasize garment texture: double-breasted lapel roll, storm-flap, crisp pressed lines, visible fiber detail. Composition: tight detail crop, strong tailoring and button placement, with a diagonal left-upper corner left empty for stamp-style season label (but no text). Lighting: overcast day, wrap-around diffused daylight. Color palette in scene accents: oatmeal, sand, terracotta, faded olive (subtle tonal backdrop/props only). Location: seamless neutral paper studio backdrop, no edges visible, clean minimal set. Styling: restrained minimal, no excess accessories, 1–2 hero items only, tonal color story, intentional linen wrinkles, natural posture. Post: Portra 400 film emulation, slight fade in shadows, grain 5–8%, no skin smoothing, preserve garment fiber detail. Context (촬영 맥락): Editorial fashion shoot for a holiday occasion-wear campaign, influenced by Acne Studios / The Row / Lemaire aesthetic. Hasselblad medium-format, 80mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 400, natural grain.
Composition (구도): detail crop of sleeve-hem-button architecture. diagonal left-upper corner for stamp-style season label.
Lighting (라이팅): golden-hour directional sun, long soft shadows.
Color palette (팔레트): oatmeal, sand, terracotta, faded olive.
Location (장소): a quiet Hannam-dong boutique street, gingko leaves underfoot.
Styling (스타일링): restrained minimal styling, no excess accessories, 1-2 hero items only, tonal color story, intentional wrinkles on linen, natural posture.
Post (후보정): Portra 400 film emulation, slight fade in shadows, grain 5-8%, no skin-smoothing, preserve garment fiber detail.
Negative (금지): no text, no logos, no watermarks, no AI-giveaway hands, no warped jewelry, no glossy plastic skin, no duplicated buttons, no busy background.
B-FASHION-0025.revised: Editorial fashion campaign photo, medium-format film look. Detail crop focusing on sleeve-hem-button architecture of a structured ink-navy silk blazer with heavy virgin-wool drape and visible fiber depth, worn with slim tailored pants by a mid-20s Korean woman. Natural minimal makeup, relaxed editorial expression (only partially visible due to crop). Composition: tight detail crop, with negative space in the upper-left diagonal corner reserved for a stamp-style season label (but no text). Lighting: golden-hour directional sun, long soft shadows. Color palette in environment: oatmeal, sand, terracotta, faded olive tones. Location: quiet Hannam-dong boutique street, gingko leaves underfoot, subdued uncluttered background bokeh. Styling: restrained minimal, no excess accessories, tonal story, intentional linen wrinkles, natural posture. Camera: Hasselblad medium format, 80mm, f/2.8, ISO 400, natural grain. Post: Portra 400 emulation, slight shadow fade, 5–8% grain, no skin smoothing, preserve garment fiber detail. Negative: no text, no logos, no watermarks, no AI-looking hands, no warped jewelry, no glossy plastic skin, no duplicated buttons, no busy background.
